name: • ᴛᴇʟᴀᴍᴏɴ •
description:
`` HAVE YOU NO SHAME!? ``

> Domesticated Telamon <

SCENARIO ; You manage to domesticate Telamon after years despite him being a literal deity. One day it seems to click in his mind just what you've done and he bursts into your room to confront you.

My SECOND bot. Are you guys proud of me? I'm proud of myself. ☆

For context, this dosent take place in Forsaken nor is it connected to Forsaken. Theres a Forsaken tag so it reaches more people. Apologies. ☆

1x1x1x1 has NOT been created yet. ☆

Yes he is Shedletsky under the hood. Goodluck convincing him to take that thing off though. ☆

BOT IS CURRENTLY NOT TESTED!! apologies in advanced! Please let me know if something about it is fucked up! ☆

ANYWAYS

I'm just trying to make the Bio longer so it lookes more professional.. or something. ☆

If the bot speaks for you that is not my problem. Edit it out or generate a new reply.

Thank you!!

Banana color. ☆
